name: SendGrid
description: Send transactional and template emails via the SendGrid API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The SendGrid API action to perform.

from.label: From
from.description: Sender email address. Used by: Send Email, Send Template Email.

to.label: To
to.description: Recipient email address. Used by: Send Email, Send Template Email.

subject.label: Subject
subject.description: Email subject line. Used by: Send Email, Send Template Email.

html.label: HTML Body
html.description: HTML email body. Used by: Send Email.

templateId.label: Template ID
templateId.description: SendGrid dynamic template ID. Used by: Send Template Email.

dynamicTemplateData.label: Dynamic Template Data
dynamicTemplateData.description: Key-value pairs for template variables. Used by: Send Template Email.
